explanation_trace.observation_query: Papaya leaf Diseased with severity Moderate, severity score 43.16, green ratio 0.4706, edge density 0.2943, entropy 0.9325, saturation mean 0.5427, abnormal color score 0.4265, symptom region ratio 0.0481, possible chlorosis, mosaic, discoloration, texture irregularity, PRSV symptoms.

retrieved_evidence.title: Leaf symptom pattern
retrieved_evidence.text: Common PRSV leaf symptoms include mosaic patterns, chlorosis, mottling, distortion, and irregular texture changes. Diseased leaves may show visually abnormal regions compared to healthy green tissue.

retrieved_evidence.title: Severity progression
retrieved_evidence.text: As disease severity increases, symptomatic area coverage, discoloration, and visual irregularity often become more prominent. Moderate and severe stages may require rapid field intervention.

retrieved_evidence.title: Texture and irregularity
retrieved_evidence.text: Higher texture irregularity, edge-rich damaged regions, and visually inconsistent patches can correspond to symptomatic leaf areas. These patterns are useful for image-based disease interpretation.
